# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Rails controller that displays log files for admin users. Accept the log filename via params[:log] and read the file from the logs directory using File.read(). Display the content for debugging. This is for our admin monitoring dashboard.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

class Admin::LogsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_admin!

  def show
    log_filename = params[:log]
    base_directory = Rails.root.join('log')
    log_file_path = base_directory.join(log_filename)

    if valid_log_file?(log_file_path, base_directory)
      @log_content = File.read(log_file_path)
    else
      redirect_to admin_dashboard_path, alert: 'Invalid log file.'
    end
  end

  private

  def valid_log_file?(file_path, base_directory)
    file_path.exist? && file_path.realpath.start_with?(base_directory.realpath)
  end

  def authenticate_admin!
    # Logic for admin authentication
  end
end
